title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 199.037 - Patient rights, rules and regulations, director to promulgate — exception
text:
199.037.  Patient rights, rules and regulations, director to promulgate — exception. — The director of the department shall promulgate reasonable rules relative to the implementation of patient rights described in sections 199.001 to 199.051.  These rules shall not apply to facilities, programs or services operated or provided by the curators of the University of Missouri.
(L. 1991 H.B. 218 merged with S.B. 125 & 341, A.L. 1996 S.B. 540, A.L. 2011 H.B. 464)
